channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Senator Bill Cassidy loses Louisiana GOP primary
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy failed to place in the top two in Louisiana's Republican Senate primary, AP projects. The race heads to a June runoff.

item.title: GOP demands crypto industry prove its financial commitment
item.description: Republicans have secured major policy wins for crypto in Washington, but are growing frustrated with the industry's largest political donor.

item.title: Boomers have the space. Millennials have the kids
item.description: Empty nesters occupy large family homes in America, while younger generations with children lack adequate housing.

item.title: Farmers growing increasingly desperate amid rising energy and fertilizer prices
item.description: Midwest farmers face severe financial strain as the Iran conflict drives up diesel and fertilizer costs ahead of planting season.
